title: Review: TechGnosis by Erik Davis (Fortnight)
author: Brendan Duffin
card_summary: A brief book review of Erik Davis's TechGnosis published in the Irish magazine Fortnight in November 1999. Reviews Davis's exploration of the intersection between mysticism, myth, and information technology from the printing press to the internet age.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/[Fortnight 1999-nov iss. 381] Techgnosis_ Myth, Magic and Mysticism in the Age of Informationby Erik Davis{Review by_ Brendan Duffin}(1999 November)[10.2307_25559785]{54386821} libgen.li.pdf
